reviews.review_description: I enjoyed the game A lot I just wish there was a way to insult the adventurers when they are stupid you give him an S rank weapon he dies and he blames you not cool. Overall the game is fun! Two thumbs up.

Okay, blacksmithing is awesome. So the idea of a blacksmithing in vr with the gear vr controller is awesome. But the more I play this, I notice major issues. 

1. The controls are terrible. I don't have a good enough sense of where the hammer is going to hit, so I end up missing the hammer spots. I also hit directly onto them and the hit doesn't register or it'll count it as right before it goes away.

2. Why the hell can't we fight with the weapons?! Why are we MAKING the weapons for someone else? Why can't we fight the monsters? This is essentially like setting up a dinner party and not being allowed to join it.

3.  Why is the controller stationary to where my head is? This is a very poor option because every other vr controller title can support movement around the player. This however does not, it feels like head restricted whack a mole.
This looks fun but is not I played it for a small amount of time in i wanted to take the sword I just made and stab myself with it
Zany music timing blacksmith game. Headset controls work easily.

This game as is is still worth the money, but I would like more depth. I would like to be able to put on a handle and every aspect of making a sword, rather than just hammering. Also in freestyle, it is not really free style. Every blade looks the same no matter what you do to it. Overall, it is a fun vr game and worth a play.
Great simple idea! I live the 8bit fighting sequence after forging. Also the music and sound effects really enhance the game!

Like the previous reviewer remarked, the controller implementation is bad. Unlocking the X axis helped, but the fundamental issue that the way the hammer moves just doesn't match the controller.

The cause is simple: you're not using the arm model. Update your game to use it, and the experience will feel much more immersive.

reviews.review_title: Fun little game for the motion control
reviews.review_description: If you have the new gear vr controller, this is a fun little game to use it with!
